features.name: Sendungsnummer
features.label: Tracking number
features.description: Electronic tracking for supported letter products (e.g. A-Mail Plus via WebStamp). Letter-only scope; not a parcel scan pipeline.

features.name: Zuschlag Dicke
features.label: Thickness surcharge
features.description: Automatic surcharge when thickness exceeds the standard band; amount from rules.json and prices/services.json.
